channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Data shows migrants aren't taking 'Black jobs' or 'Hispanic jobs,' despite what Trump says
item.description: Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump promises the biggest deportation event the U.S. has ever seen if he is elected.
item.dc:creator: Fatima Hussein, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: What is California Proposition 33?
item.description: California voters this November will decide whether to expand rent control statewide by repealing a 1995 law. The Costa-Hawkins Rental Housing Act currently limits a local government's ability to cap rents on newer properties and single-family homes.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mayorkas grabs high-end sushi from DC Nobu directly after quick stop in Hurricane Helene-hit North Carolina
item.description: DHS Secretary Mayorkas was caught on camera at ritzy restaurant Nobu in D.C. just hours after visiting Hurricane Helene-torn North Carolina on official relief business.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Comer slams Raskin as 'ultimate hypocrite' after Raskin stopped short of committing to certify a Trump win
item.description: House Oversight Chair James Comer slammed Rep. Jamie Raskin as "the ultimate hypocrite" and talking "a big game" after Raskin fell short of committing to certifying a Trump win.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Battle to shore up bases remains as Election Day nears
item.description: MPR News politics editor Brian Bakst and his guest talks about deadly conflicts in the Middle East and how those have factored into domestic politics. Plus, we follow up with two Generation Z voters about how they’re approaching the election.
item.dc:creator: Brian Bakst, Matthew Alvarez, and Ellie Roth, MPR News

item.title: Vaping advocate warns Dem crackdown on 'common sense' tobacco alternatives could backfire in swing states
item.description: Fox News Digital spoke to vaping industry expert Tony Abboud about users of tobacco alternatives who could potentially be "single issue" voters in November
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: House Democrats bet on small and fun events for minority outreach
item.description: The House Democratic campaign arm is increasingly relying on small, community-centered events for its get-out-the-vote efforts among voters of color, looking to increase interest with nonpolitical hooks.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, NewsNation

item.title: Elon Musk unveils Tesla's 'Cybercab,' plans to bring autonomous driving tech to other models in 2025
item.description: Tesla unveiled its long-awaited robotaxi at a Hollywood studio Thursday night, though fans of the electric vehicle maker will have to wait until at least 2026 before they are available. CEO Elon Musk said the “Cybercab” doesn’t have steering wheels or pedals.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Senate candidates steer clear of debates
item.description: Senate candidates this cycle are largely steering clear of the debate stage, in some cases avoiding it altogether, marking a major change from past years as campaigns question the debates' importance. For years, it was common for top Senate races to feature multiple debates.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: In Pacific Northwest, 2 toss-up US House races could determine control of narrowly divided Congress
item.description: PORTLAND, Ore. (AP) — In their battle for Congress, national Republicans and Democrats are keenly eyeing the Pacific Northwest, where two of the most competitive U.S. House races in the country are playing out.
item.dc:creator: CLAIRE RUSH and HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump's complaints about '60 Minutes' put a spotlight on editing at the nation's top newsmagazine
item.description: Donald Trump skipped a “60 Minutes” interview this past week, but he's attacking CBS for how it handled its session with opponent Kamala Harris, calling it a “giant fake news scam” and suggesting the network was out to protect her.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Shondra Summers-Armstrong discusses key issues in Las Vegas city council race
item.description: LAS VEGAS (KLAS) — Shondra Summers-Armstrong, currently serving as an Assemblywoman for District 6, is running for Las Vegas City Council, Ward 5.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump visits Aurora after Venezuelan gang claims
item.description: The Trump campaign called Aurora a "war zone" in its rally announcement. The city's Republican mayor disagrees.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: Trump leads Harris by 4 points in Florida: Survey
item.description: Former President Trump is leading Vice President Harris by a narrow 4 points in Florida, according to a new survey of likely voters in the state.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: Interim NYPD Commissioner Tom Donlon could resign: sources
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Less than a month after the NYPD's interim commissioner was appointed, another major shake-up could be coming. Interim NYPD Commissioner Tom Donlon is expected to step down, sources said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, PIX 11

item.title: Pat Ryan, Alison Esposito face off in NY-18 debate on PIX11
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Democratic U.S. Rep. Pat Ryan and Republican Alison Esposito, the two candidates running to represent New York's 18th Congressional District, faced off in a debate on PIX11 Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, NewsNation

item.title: Harris reveals owning a Glock: 'Of course' I've fired it
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris said in a "60 Minutes" interview that aired Monday that she owns a Glock and has fired it at a shooting range in another example of how she and her campaign have made a point to highlight her gun ownership.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Fact checking falsehoods about FEMA funding and Hurricane Helene
item.description: Rumors, misinformation and lies about the federal government’s response to Hurricane Helene have run rampant since the storm made landfall, especially around FEMA funding.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Fowler, MPR News

item.title: Supreme Court won't hear arguments in Texas emergency abortion case
item.description: The Supreme Court decided not to hear arguments in a case involving Texas that could have provided an answer about whether a state abortion ban conflicts with a federal emergency care law.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, Fox 5

item.title: Johnson sidesteps question on whether Trump lost 2020 election: ‘This is a gotcha game’
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) on Sunday sidestepped a question about whether former President Trump lost the 2020 presidential election, calling it a “gotcha game” that he would not play.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: It’s a close race for Michigan. These factors could decide it for Harris or Trump
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris needs to win back Michigan voters President Joe Biden looked poised to lose. Donald Trump’s appeal remains strong here, but he’s not without his own struggles.
item.dc:creator: Majd Al-Waheidi, MPR News

item.title: Walz says he'll 'own up' when he misspeaks as the Democratic ticket steps up media interviews
item.description: The “Fox News Sunday” interview reflected a broader media blitz by presidential nominee Kamala Harris and Walz as the Democrats seek to garner public attention in the final 30 days of the campaign.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News
